name: PRINCESS GIRLFRIEND 2 A TRACEY BREAKS MOMENT
author: moment
description: A few years ago, BTB (before tracey brakes) a pre-Tracey Tracey uploaded a “SOPHIE/Flume inspired” sample pack to r/drumkits under the pseudonym “Princess Girlfriend”, which garnered surprising success. Its clanging snares and goopy fx went on to shape the sound of multiple offshoots of the hyperpop scene. Tracey has since achieved notoriety as a producer, vocalist, and general twitter nuisance, and continues to drop free samples every month. Brakes now aims to bridge the gap between new and old with Princess Girlfriend 2.
